frontmatter.title: Maximum Area of a Piece of Cake After Horizontal and Vertical Cuts
frontmatter.description: Find maximum area of a piece of cake after making horizontal and vertical cuts.

frontmatter.title: Find the Maximum Subarray Sum with Unique Values
frontmatter.description: Given an array, find the maximum subarray sum with unique values.

frontmatter.title: Maximum Product of Word Lengths
frontmatter.description: Given an array of strings, return the maximum value of the product of lengths where two words do not share any common letters.

frontmatter.title: Minimum Amount of Coins Required to Make up an Amount
frontmatter.description: You are given an infinite number of coins of different denominations and an amount. Find the minimum number of coins required to make up that amount.

frontmatter.description: Given a binary string, count no of substrings with only 1's.

frontmatter.title: Number of Differing Bits
frontmatter.description: Given two integers count the number of positions where there bit representation differ.

frontmatter.title: Count Number of Set Bits of an Integer using Brian-Kernighan Method
frontmatter.description: Count the number of set bits of an integer.

frontmatter.title: Maximum Value of Equation of Ones with Addition and Multiplication Operations
frontmatter.description: Find the maximum value of an equation of ones with addition and multiplication operations
